stemHtml:
Which of these statements about induced drag are correct or incorrect?

I. A rectangular spanwise lift distribution generates less induced drag than an elliptical lift distribution.
II. Induced drag increases with increasing aspect ratio.

options.a: I is correct, II is incorrect.
options.b: I is correct, II is correct.
options.c: I is incorrect, II is correct.
options.d: I is incorrect, II is incorrect.
